parameters.query: SELECT id, topic, summary, trend_score FROM factory.topics WHERE status = 'pending' AND produced = FALSE ORDER BY trend_score DESC, created_at ASC LIMIT 2
INSERT INTO factory.logs (level, service, event, message, topic_id, script_id, metadata) VALUES ('info', 'scriptwriter', 'script_generated', $1, $2::uuid, $3::uuid, $4::jsonb)
